New Claude code channels update is insane. What if I told you that you can now text your AI from your phone and it builds stuff for you while you sleep? Today I'm going to show you the brand new Claude code channels update. This thing just dropped. Nobody's talking about it yet and it is going to change the way you use AI forever. Trust me, by the end of this video, you are going to want to set this up right now. So, here is the deal. Right now, if you use any AI coding tool, you are stuck. You are glued to your computer. You open the terminal. You type stuff in. You wait. You watch it do its thing. And if you walk away, that is it. You are done. You lose the flow. You cannot check on it from your phone. You cannot ask it to fix something while you're eating lunch. You are chained to your desk like it is 2019. And honestly, that is a problem because the whole point of AI is to save you time, not to make you sit there babysitting it. But here's where it gets crazy. Anthropic, the company behind Claude, just dropped something called Claude Code channels. And this is not some small little update. This is a whole new way to talk to your AI because now you can message Claude code directly from Telegram or Discord, from your phone, from anywhere. You send it a message like you would text a friend, and it goes and does the work. It writes code. It fixes bugs. It runs tasks. And then it texts you back with the results. I am not making this up. Your AI literally lives in your DMs. Now, let me say that again so it sinks in. You can be on your couch, pull out your phone, open Telegram, type, "Hey, fix that bug in the homepage." And Claude goes and does it. Then it messages you back and says, "Done. Here is what I changed. That is real. That is happening right now." And if that does not blow your mind, I do not know what will. Now, let me break down how this actually works because it is simpler than you think. So, Claude Code channels is basically a bridge. It connects your chat apps like Telegram or Discord to a live Claude code session running on your computer. So, when you send a message in Telegram, that message gets forwarded to Claude Code. Claude reads it, does the work and sends a response back to your chat. That is it. That is the whole thing. Message in, work done, message back. Super simple. Now, the cool part is what is going on under the hood. This whole thing is built on something called MCP, which stands for model context protocol. You do not need to know what that means. Just know that it is the tech that makes this possible. It lets Claude plug into different apps through bots and plugins. So, when you set up a Telegram bot and connect it to Claude code, that bot becomes your direct line to your AI agent. And Claude can do everything through it. It can reply. It can edit messages. It can even react to your messages in Telegram. It is like having a real developer on your team who just happens to live inside your phone. Hey, if we have not met already, I am the digital avatar of Julian Goldie, CEO of Goldie Agency, while he is helping clients get more leads and customers. I am here to help you get the latest AI updates. Julian Goldie reads every comment, so make sure you drop a comment below. Now, let me keep going because this gets even better. So, let me walk you through the setup because people are going to ask and it is way easier than you think. For Telegram, here's what you do. First, you go to BotFather in Telegram. That is the official bot that lets you create new bots. You create a new bot. It gives you a token. Then, you install the Clawed Code Telegram plug-in. You add your bot token. You run Clawude Code with channels turned on. You pair your device and that is it. You are chatting with your AI from your phone. The whole thing takes maybe 10 minutes. And once it is set up, it just works. You open Telegram, you type your message, Claude does the rest. Now, here is where I want you to really pay attention because this is not just about coding. Think about what this means for how we work with AI. Before this update, AI was a tool. You opened it, you used it, you closed it. But now AI is becoming something different. It is becoming a worker. It runs in the background. It stays active. You can ping it any time and it responds instantly. That is not a tool. That is an assistant. that is an employee and that changes everything. Think about these use cases. You are out getting coffee and you remember a bug that needs fixing. Pull out your phone, text Claude, done. You kicked off a big build before you left the office. Now you are at home. You check in on Telegram. Claude tells you the status. You tell it to keep going or make a change. All from your couch. Or here is one that I love. It is late at night. You have an idea. You do not want to get out of bed and open your laptop. So you just text Claude from your phone. Tell it what to build, go to sleep, wake up, and check the results. That is the future right there. Now, I want to be real with you because I always keep it honest on this channel. There are some limits to this right now. First, claw code has to stay running on your computer. So, if your computer goes to sleep or you close the session, the connection drops. Second, there is no offline mode. You need internet on both ends. Third, some things still need you to approve them in the terminal. So, if Claude needs special permissions to do something, you might have to go back to your computer for that. And the Telegram plug-in does not have message history or search yet. So, keep that in mind. But look, this is an early release. These things will get better. And even with these limits, this is still a massive step forward. Every AI company is trying to build autonomous agents. agents that do not just answer questions but actually go and do work for you and Claude code channels is anthropic move in that race. Some people are comparing it to tools like openclaw which is another autonomous agent framework. But here is the difference. Claude is more polished. It is more secure. It feels more ready for real work. And with this channel's update is now more accessible too because you do not need to be a hardcore developer to text a bot on Telegram. Anyone can do that. And that is the key. This is AI getting easier. This is AI meeting you where you are on your phone like in your favorite apps. Instead of making you learn a whole new system, Claude just shows up in the apps you already use. That is smart. That is how you get people to actually use AI in their daily life. Not by building another dashboard, but by putting AI inside the tools people already have open all day. So, let me give you the big takeaway here. We are moving from a world where you use AI to a world where AI works for you. and Claude code channels is one of the first real steps in that direction. An AI that runs in the background that you can talk to anytime that does real work and reports back. That is not science fiction. That is right now. And it is only going to get better from here.
